title: mclient is unaware of merge tables and remote tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (i Int32, j String, k Date DEFAULT today());
CREATE TABLE mt1 (m Int32, n Float64, o UInt8);
INSERT INTO t1 (i, j) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM mt1 ARRAY JOIN (SELECT i, j FROM t1 WHERE j IS NOT NULL) AS t ON mt1.m = t.i;
key_bug_features: mclient fails with merge and remote table operations
